retry_reason: If the lookup fails (request not in map_checks), the request has already been cancelled or is otherwise absent; retrying the same operation would not change this condition.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that cancels a pending map check request. It looks up the request in the osdc's map_checks list; if found, it erases the entry and releases the reference on the request via ceph_osdc_put_request. The caller must hold the osdc write lock. After this call, the caller must not use the request object any further, as it may be freed. If the request is not found in map_checks, the function is a no-op.
